description: Smart Memory hooks - error tracking, session context, and compact preservation via SQLite

hooks.prompt: Before finishing, update the project status in Smart Memory. Run: python3 ~/.claude/plugins/local/devops-ssh/hooks/smart-memory-db.py update-status '{"project_path": "$CWD", "session_id": "$SESSION_ID", "status": "<current_status>", "current_task": "<what_was_being_worked_on>", "completed_tasks": "<what_was_completed>", "pending_tasks": "<what_remains>", "notes": "<any_important_notes>"}'. Fill in the placeholders with actual values from this session.
